category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP / KN95-type mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to the Colombian market (NTC respirator standards adopted by ICONTEC, Ministry of Labour SG-SST occupational framework under Decreto 1072/2015, in-country importer, and INVIMA for medical masks). Colombia has no EU-style horizontal PPE regulation; respiratory protection is governed through the occupational health and safety (SG-SST) regime plus voluntary/contractual NTC conformity and, for medical masks, INVIMA health registration.

title.en: China-to-Colombia PPE Respirator (KN95 / FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入哥伦比亚（KN95/FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入哥倫比亞（KN95/FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 and GB 19083) documentation against Colombian market-access expectations: NTC respirator standards adopted by ICONTEC, the occupational health and safety (SG-SST) framework under Decreto 1072/2015 administered by the Ministry of Labour, the in-country importer's obligations, and INVIMA health registration for medical/surgical masks. Colombia does not operate an EU-style horizontal PPE regulation; the RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ technical regulations cover electrical, lighting and energy-labelling products rather than respiratory PPE, so respirator conformity runs through occupational, voluntary-standard and (for medical masks) sanitary channels.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626及GB 19083）文件与哥伦比亚市场准入要求对照：ICONTEC采用的NTC呼吸器标准、劳动部依据Decreto 1072/2015管理的职业健康与安全（SG-SST）框架、在地进口商义务，以及医用/外科口罩的INVIMA卫生注册。哥伦比亚没有欧盟式的横向PPE法规；RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ技术规章涵盖电气、照明及能效标签产品，而非呼吸防护PPE，因此呼吸器合规通过职业、自愿标准及（医用口罩的）卫生渠道实现。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626及GB 19083）文件與哥倫比亞市場准入要求對照：ICONTEC採用的NTC呼吸器標準、勞動部依據Decreto 1072/2015管理的職業健康與安全（SG-SST）框架、在地進口商義務，以及醫用/外科口罩的INVIMA衛生註冊。哥倫比亞沒有歐盟式的橫向PPE法規；RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ技術規章涵蓋電氣、照明及能效標籤產品，而非呼吸防護PPE，因此呼吸器合規通過職業、自願標準及（醫用口罩的）衛生渠道實現。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Colombian law, Ministry of Labour SG-SST obligations, applicable NTC standards, INVIMA medical-device requirements, and Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio (SIC) enforcement practice with qualified Colombian regulatory professionals before shipment or sale. Colombia does not regulate filtering respirators under an EU-style horizontal PPE regulation; the route described here is occupational, voluntary-standard and (for medical masks) sanitary, and requires case-by-case verification.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或销售前，应与合格的哥伦比亚法规专业人士核验现行哥伦比亚法律、劳动部SG-SST义务、适用的NTC标准、INVIMA医疗器械要求及工商监督局（SIC）的执法实践。哥伦比亚不以欧盟式横向PPE法规监管过滤式呼吸器；本文所述路径为职业、自愿标准及（医用口罩的）卫生路径，须逐案核实。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或銷售前，應與合格的哥倫比亞法規專業人士核驗現行哥倫比亞法律、勞動部SG-SST義務、適用的NTC標準、INVIMA醫療器械要求及工商監督局（SIC）的執法實踐。哥倫比亞不以歐盟式橫向PPE法規監管過濾式呼吸器；本文所述路徑為職業、自願標準及（醫用口罩的）衛生路徑，須逐案核實。

answer_first.en: Colombia has no EU-style horizontal PPE regulation for filtering respirators. Two routes matter: (1) OCCUPATIONAL/INDUSTRIAL — respiratory protection is governed by the Ministry of Labour's SG-SST framework (Decreto 1072/2015), where the employer must supply suitable certified PPE; in practice respirators are specified against NTC standards (adopted by ICONTEC, largely tracking ISO/EN/NIOSH) and conformity is contractual or via ONAC-accredited certification rather than a single mandatory technical regulation; (2) MEDICAL/SURGICAL MASKS — these are medical devices requiring INVIMA sanitary registration, a completely different route. Chinese GB 2626 (KN95) and GB 19083 reports are not automatically recognised; an in-country importer of record is required, and the RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ technical regulations do NOT apply to respirators (they cover electrical, lighting, and energy-labelling products).
answer_first.zh: 哥伦比亚没有针对过滤式呼吸器的欧盟式横向PPE法规。两条路径很重要：（1）职业/工业——呼吸防护由劳动部的SG-SST框架（Decreto 1072/2015）管辖，雇主须提供合适的认证PPE；实务中呼吸器依据NTC标准（由ICONTEC采用，大体对接ISO/EN/NIOSH）确定，合规通过合同约定或ONAC认可认证实现，而非单一强制技术规章；（2）医用/外科口罩——属医疗器械，须INVIMA卫生注册，是完全不同的路径。中国GB 2626（KN95）及GB 19083报告不会自动获得认可；须有在地进口商作为责任主体，且RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ技术规章不适用于呼吸器（其涵盖电气、照明及能效标签产品）。
answer_first.zht: 哥倫比亞沒有針對過濾式呼吸器的歐盟式橫向PPE法規。兩條路徑很重要：（1）職業/工業——呼吸防護由勞動部的SG-SST框架（Decreto 1072/2015）管轄，雇主須提供合適的認證PPE；實務中呼吸器依據NTC標準（由ICONTEC採用，大體對接ISO/EN/NIOSH）確定，合規通過合同約定或ONAC認可認證實現，而非單一強制技術規章；（2）醫用/外科口罩——屬醫療器械，須INVIMA衛生註冊，是完全不同的路徑。中國GB 2626（KN95）及GB 19083報告不會自動獲得認可；須有在地進口商作為責任主體，且RETIE/RETILAP/RETIQ技術規章不適用於呼吸器（其涵蓋電氣、照明及能效標籤產品）。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or on regulatory change (Ministry of Labour SG-SST, ICONTEC/NTC revision, INVIMA, SIC, ONAC)
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official Colombian regulator, standards body, or primary legal sources (Ministerio de Trabajo, ICONTEC, INVIMA, SIC, ONAC, gov.co) are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
